name: Release Checklist
about: Pre-publication verification for Vol. or snapshot
labels: type:release

## Release Target
[Vol.X or Vol.X.Y or snapshot name]

## Pre-Release Checks
- [ ] All definitions finalized
- [ ] Notation standardized across document
- [ ] No conflicting symbols with prior volumes
- [ ] All proofs verified
- [ ] Examples and toy models included and correct
- [ ] Living Index updated
- [ ] Cross-volume dependencies checked
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] DOI placeholder prepared (Zenodo)

## Zenodo Metadata (if applicable)
- [ ] Title finalized
- [ ] Authors and affiliations confirmed
- [ ] Abstract written
- [ ] Keywords assigned
- [ ] DOI pending or assigned: [TBD]

## arXiv / Publication (if applicable)
- [ ] Not yet submitted
- [ ] Submitted: [TBD]
- [ ] Preprint ID: [TBD]

## Final Sign-Off
- [ ] Ready for publication

## Notes
[Final remarks before release]
